# JDK-8340232: Optimize DataInputStream::readUTF

> **PR**: [20903](https://github.com/openjdk/jdk/pull/20903) | **Author**: wenshao | **Status**: merged

---

## Summary

Similar to ObjectInputStream, use JLA.countPositives and JLA.inflateBytesToChars to speed up readUTF
